---
title: "Billet avec code"
description: ""
bibliography: ../ref_blg.bib
csl: ../evolution.csl
date: "2025-04-11"
categories: ["analysis"]
image: "https://marcolivierbeausoleil.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2015/07/cropped-imgp81461.jpg"
execute: 
  message: false
  warning: false
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## *Titre de section*

```{r}
# brew install mp3splt nĂ©cessaire

library(monitoR)
library(seewave)
library(ggplot2)

birds_audio = list.files(path = "/Volumes/Brainmemory/music_MBP/chants_oiseaux/Exportation_audacity/chants_no_name2", 
           pattern = '.mp3',
           full.names = TRUE)


birds_sub= grep(pattern = 'paruline', x = birds_audio , ignore.case = TRUE, value = TRUE)

rec_time = NULL
rec_sound_list = NULL
for (file_i in 1:length(birds_sub)) {
  fichier_nom = basename(birds_sub[file_i])
  mss = sprintf('Fichier : %s', fichier_nom)
  message(mss)
  bf_i = tuneR::readMP3(filename = birds_sub[file_i])
  # load the spectrogram
sound_data <- seewave::ggspectro(bf_i,
                                 norm = T, 
                                 flim=c(0.1,10), # frequency limits, kHz 
                                 wl = 512, # fft window length (start w/ 1024 or 512 )
                                 ovlp = 80) # % window overlap, x direction
# get the spectrogram data to darken the background and make nice contrast
hmm<-seewave::spectro(bf_i,plot=F) 
# get the high and low contrast numbers to cut out 
top =quantile(hmm$amp,probs = .99)
bottom = quantile(hmm$amp,probs = 0.4)
# reset all values above the top value to the top and below the bottom value
sound_data$data$amplitude_cut <- dplyr::case_when(sound_data$data$amplitude>top ~top ,
                                                  sound_data$data$amplitude<bottom ~bottom,
                                                  TRUE ~ sound_data$data$amplitude)
# max time of recording 
max_time = max(sound_data$data$time)

# GGplot 
gg_sound= sound_data+
  geom_raster(aes(fill = amplitude_cut)) + 
  # scale_fill_viridis_c(option = 'plasma',
  #                      na.value = viridis::plasma(n = 100)[1])+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks= seq(0,max_time,1),minor_breaks = seq(0,max_time,.25))+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks= seq(0,max_time,1),minor_breaks = seq(0,max_time,.25))+
  coord_cartesian (xlim = c(0, 10)) +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(legend.position = 'none') + 
  labs(title = fichier_nom)

# print the plot
print(gg_sound)

sl = list(sound_data)
names(sl) = fichier_nom
rec_sound_list = c(rec_sound_list, fichier_nom)

datatime = data.frame(sp = fichier_nom, 
                        s = readline(paste("Start ", sep='')), 
           e = readline(paste("End ", sep='')))
rec_time =rbind(rec_time, datatime)

invisible(readline(prompt="Press [enter] to continue"))
}



```

### *RĂ©fĂ©rences*

::: {#refs}
:::
